name: Empowerment & Inclusion Capital I Corp.
description: Empowerment & Inclusion Capital I Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search for a target business that is uniquely positioned to deliver robust financial performance while fostering a diverse, equitable, and inclusive environment, with a particular focus on businesses owned by underrepresented groups or those promoting social and economic justice.
